title: UREES 026
shortDescription: One-of-one upcycled wearable piece — hand-altered, never repeated.
longStory: Each UREES piece begins as a found garment. Through cutting, stitching and intention, it becomes something entirely new — a wearable poem.

title: UREES Drop 02 — Piece VII
shortDescription: From the second UREES drop — a collector piece.
longStory: Part of an ongoing series of upcycled garments. This piece carries the memory of its previous life and the mark of its transformation.
